title: Free energy differences and coexistence of clathrate structures II and H via lattice-switch Monte Carlo
summary: We introduce a simulation technique to compute the free energy difference between two hydrate structures of different stoichiometry connected to a reservoir of gas molecules at a prescribed pressure. The method permits the determination of coexistence parameters for the system when the two hydrate structures have the same number of water molecules $N_w$. The approach is based on performing isobaric Lattice Switch Monte Carlo simulations to measure free energy differences between the hydrate structures when they are either fully occupied by gas molecules, or fully empty. This measurement is combined with thermodynamic integration within an ensemble in which the number of guest molecules $N_g$ can fluctuate under the control of a chemical potential $μ_g$. We analyze the properties of the resulting constant-$N_w,μ_g,P,T$ ensemble and show how it can be used to calculate coexistence points via a thermodynamic cycle. Applying the method to argon and methane structures, we find coexistence pressures that are in good agreement overall with the available experimental data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算不同化学计量水合物结构自由能差的模拟方法，用于确定共存参数
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够计算不同化学计量水合物结构之间自由能差的方法，以确定系统的共存参数，特别是在两种水合物结构具有相同水分子数时
AI.method: 结合等压晶格切换蒙特卡洛模拟和热力学积分：1) 测量完全充满或完全空置水合物结构的自由能差；2) 在客体分子数可波动的系综中进行热力学积分，控制化学势
AI.result: 方法成功应用于氩和甲烷水合物结构，计算得到的共存压力与现有实验数据总体吻合良好
AI.conclusion: 该方法为计算不同化学计量水合物结构的自由能差和确定共存参数提供了一种有效的模拟技术，验证了其在真实气体系统中的适用性

title: Ion-Specific Anomalous Water Diffusion in Aqueous Electrolytes: A Machine-Learned Many-Body Force Field Study with MACE
summary: The dynamics of water in electrolyte solutions exhibits a striking, ion-specific anomaly: the diffusion coefficient of water is enhanced relative to the neat liquid in chaotropic CsI solutions, yet suppressed in kosmotropic NaCl solutions. This phenomenon, long challenging for classical force-field-based molecular dynamics, is studied here using classical molecular dynamics simulations with a many-body machine-learned force field (MLFF) trained within the MACE equivariant graph neural network framework. The force field is trained on energies, forces, and stresses computed at the density functional theory level with the revPBE-D3 exchange--correlation functional, which provides a reliable balance between accuracy and computational efficiency for aqueous systems. Simulations of NaCl and CsI aqueous solutions at ambient conditions over a concentration range of 0.89--3.56~mol/kg reproduce the experimentally observed anomalous diffusion and show a quantitative improvement over previous results obtained with the DeePMD framework, trained on the same theory, particularly for NaCl solutions. This improvement is traced to a stronger Na$^{+}$--water interaction in the first hydration shell and the non-negligible retarding contribution of the second hydration shell of Na$^{+}$. For CsI solutions, the water acceleration is shown to be primarily driven by the anion I$^{-}$, whose diffuse and weakly structured hydration shell facilitates rapid water exchange with the bulk. These results are rationalised through a shell-decomposition analysis of time-dependent water diffusivities and ion--oxygen potentials of mean force providing a coherent microscopic picture of the acceleration--retardation mechanism in the studied aqueous electrolytes.

AI.tldr: 使用基于MACE等变图神经网络的机器学习力场，成功模拟了电解质溶液中水扩散的离子特异性异常现象：CsI溶液增强水扩散，NaCl溶液抑制水扩散。
AI.motivation: 电解质溶液中水动力学表现出离子特异性异常现象：CsI（离液）溶液中水扩散系数增强，而NaCl（亲液）溶液中水扩散系数被抑制。这一现象长期以来对经典力场分子动力学模拟具有挑战性。
AI.method: 使用基于MACE等变图神经网络的机器学习力场（MLFF），在revPBE-D3密度泛函理论水平上训练能量、力和应力。模拟NaCl和CsI水溶液在0.89-3.56 mol/kg浓度范围内的环境条件。
AI.result: 成功再现了实验观察到的异常扩散现象，相比之前使用DeePMD框架的结果有定量改进（特别是NaCl溶液）。Na⁺-水相互作用更强，第二水合层有不可忽略的阻滞作用；CsI溶液中水加速主要由I⁻驱动，其弥散且弱结构化的水合层促进水与体相的快速交换。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习力场能够准确捕捉电解质溶液中水动力学的离子特异性效应，通过壳层分解分析和平均力势提供了加速-阻滞机制的微观图像，为理解离子水合动力学提供了新见解。

title: Critical point search and linear response theory for computing electronic excitation energies of molecular systems. Part II. CASSCF
summary: The computation of excited states within the Complete Active Space Self-Consistent Field (CASSCF) framework remains a significant challenge in quantum chemistry, both theoretically and algorithmically. In this work, we extend the Kähler manifold formalism introduced in Part I of this series to the CASSCF theory, and draw a geometrical connection from the time-dependent CASSCF equations to state-specific and linear response methodologies for excited states. This is achieved by first investigating the underlying CASSCF manifold and identifying its Kähler structure, which is complicated by the nontrivial coupling of CI and orbital degrees of freedom. Building on these theoretical findings, we derive the CASSCF linear response equations in a straightforward manner, and develop a robust state-specific method that relies solely on first-order derivatives of the CASSCF energy functional. Numerical results on representative molecular systems-water, formaldehyde, and ethylene-demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed state-specific method, while revealing the difficulty of reliable identification of excited states due to nonlinearity induced by the CASSCF theory.

AI.tldr: 将Kähler流形形式扩展到CASSCF理论，建立从含时CASSCF方程到激发态状态特定和线性响应方法的几何联系，开发了仅需一阶导数的稳健状态特定方法。
AI.motivation: CASSCF框架下激发态计算在理论和算法上都是量子化学中的重大挑战，需要发展更有效的方法来处理CI和轨道自由度之间的复杂耦合。
AI.method: 扩展Kähler流形形式到CASSCF理论，研究CASSCF流形的Kähler结构，推导CASSCF线性响应方程，开发仅需CASSCF能量泛函一阶导数的状态特定方法。
AI.result: 在代表性分子系统（水、甲醛、乙烯）上的数值结果证明了所提状态特定方法的有效性，但也揭示了由于CASSCF理论非线性导致的激发态可靠识别的困难。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何方法成功建立了CASSCF激发态计算的统一框架，开发了稳健的状态特定方法，但非线性特性给激发态识别带来了挑战，为未来研究提供了方向。

title: Configuration interaction extension of AGP for incorporating inter-geminal correlations
summary: In this paper, we develop a class of antisymmetrized geminal power configuration interaction (AGP-CI) wave functions that extend the AGP framework by incorporating inter-geminal correlations through a CI expansion. To make these wavefunctions computationally tractable, we evaluate them by rewriting the AGP-CI ansatz as a linear combination of AGPs (LC-AGP), for which overlaps and Hamiltonian matrix elements can be computed with standard AGP machinery. Motivated by border-rank decompositions, we further reorganize this ansatz into a compact linear combination of AGPs depending on a small deformation parameter $τ$, which controls how closely the truncated expansion approximates the full AGP-CI state. Benchmark applications to the Hubbard model and to the small molecules H$_2$O and N$_2$ demonstrate that the proposed wavefunctions achieve consistently high accuracy and outperform the LC-AGP, particularly for systems with more electrons and in strongly correlated regimes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于反对称化双电子对构型相互作用（AGP-CI）的波函数，通过CI展开引入双电子对间关联，并采用线性组合AGP（LC-AGP）形式实现高效计算，在强关联体系中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统AGP波函数虽然能有效描述双电子对关联，但缺乏双电子对之间的关联。为了在保持计算可行性的同时提高波函数精度，需要开发能够捕捉双电子对间关联的新方法。
AI.method: 提出AGP-CI波函数，通过CI展开引入双电子对间关联。为使其计算可行，将AGP-CI重写为线性组合AGP（LC-AGP）形式，利用标准AGP工具计算重叠积分和哈密顿矩阵元。进一步基于边界秩分解，将展开重组为紧凑的线性组合AGP形式，引入小变形参数τ控制截断展开对完整AGP-CI态的近似程度。
AI.result: 在Hubbard模型以及H2O和N2小分子上的基准测试表明，所提出的波函数能够实现一致的高精度，特别是在电子数较多和强关联区域，其性能优于LC-AGP方法。
AI.conclusion: AGP-CI波函数通过引入双电子对间关联，在保持计算可行性的同时显著提高了波函数精度，特别是在强关联体系中表现优异，为量子化学计算提供了有前景的新方法。

title: Controlling the Band Filling and the Band Width in Nickelate Superconductors
summary: The new family of superconducting nickelates centered around La$_{3}$Ni$_{2}$O$_{7}$ possesses attractive features, such as the high transition temperature and the presence of an antiferromagnetic ground state at ambient pressure, suggesting an unconventional pairing mechanism. In the nonsuperconducting state, the possibility of different density-wave orders with opposite pressure dependencies is discussed, whose relationships and microscopic origins are largely unknown. However, sample-quality issues, such as impurity-phase formation or oxygen vacancies, impede the progress in the field. Here, we employ high-pressure synthesis and hydrostatic high-pressure transport techniques to investigate bilayer nickelates with controlled band width and filling, and perform a systematic study on their impact on the superconductivity and other characteristic properties. While increasing the tilting of the NiO$_6$ octahedra shifts the superconducting phase to higher pressure, simultaneous hole doping reverts this trend. We also observe up to three distinct anomalies in the nonsuperconducting state which are possibly related to density-wave formation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高压合成和输运技术系统研究了双层镍酸盐的超导特性，发现NiO₆八面体倾斜度增加会使超导相移向更高压力，而空穴掺杂则逆转这一趋势，并在非超导态观察到可能与密度波形成相关的异常现象。
AI.motivation: 新型镍酸盐超导体La₃Ni₂O₇具有高转变温度和反铁磁基态等吸引人特性，表明可能存在非常规配对机制。然而样品质量问题（如杂质相形成或氧空位）阻碍了该领域进展，且非超导态中不同密度波序的压力依赖性关系及其微观起源尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用高压合成技术和静水压高压输运技术，研究具有可控带宽和填充的双层镍酸盐，系统研究这些参数对超导性和其他特征性质的影响。
AI.result: 增加NiO₆八面体倾斜度会使超导相移向更高压力，而同时进行空穴掺杂会逆转这一趋势。在非超导态观察到最多三个不同的异常现象，这些可能与密度波形成有关。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统控制带宽和填充，揭示了双层镍酸盐中超导性和其他电子有序态的调控规律，为理解这类材料的非常规超导机制提供了重要实验依据。

title: AeTHERON: Autoregressive Topology-aware Heterogeneous Graph Operator Network for Fluid-Structure Interaction
summary: Surrogate modeling of body-driven fluid flows where immersed moving boundaries couple structural dynamics to chaotic, unsteady fluid phenomena remains a fundamental challenge for both computational physics and machine learning. We present AeTHERON, a heterogeneous graph neural operator whose architecture directly mirrors the structure of the sharp-interface immersed boundary method (IBM): a dual-graph representation separating fluid and structural domains, coupled through sparse cross-attention that reflects the compact support of IBM interpolation stencils. This physics-informed inductive bias enables AeTHERON to learn nonlinear fluid-structure coupling in a shared high-dimensional latent space, with continuous sinusoidal time embeddings providing temporal generalization across lead times. We evaluate AeTHERON on direct numerical simulations of a flapping flexible caudal fin, a canonical FSI benchmark featuring leading-edge vortex formation, large membrane deformation, and chaotic wake shedding across a 4x5 parameter grid of membrane thickness (h* = 0.01-0.04) and Strouhal number (St = 0.30-0.50). As a proof-of-concept, we train on the first 150 timesteps of a representative case using a 70/30 train/validation split and evaluate on the fully unseen extrapolation window t=150-200. AeTHERON captures large-scale vortex topology and wake structure with qualitative fidelity, achieving a mean extrapolation MAE of 0.168 without retraining, with error peaking near flapping half-cycle transitions where flow reorganization is most rapid -- a physically interpretable pattern consistent with the nonlinear fluid-membrane coupling. Inference requires milliseconds per timestep on a single GPU versus hours for equivalent DNS computation. This is a continuously developing preprint; results and figures will be updated in subsequent versions.

AI.tldr: AeTHERON是一种异构图神经算子，用于模拟体驱动流体流动中的流体-结构耦合问题，通过双图表示分离流体和结构域，使用稀疏交叉注意力反映浸没边界法的插值模板，实现了毫秒级推理速度。
AI.motivation: 体驱动流体流动中，浸没运动边界将结构动力学与混沌、非定常流体现象耦合，这对计算物理和机器学习都是一个基本挑战。现有方法难以高效处理这种复杂的流体-结构相互作用。
AI.method: 提出AeTHERON异构图神经算子，其架构直接镜像锐界面浸没边界法：采用双图表示分离流体和结构域，通过稀疏交叉注意力耦合，反映IBM插值模板的紧支撑特性。使用连续正弦时间嵌入提供跨时间步长的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在拍动柔性尾鳍的DNS模拟上评估，AeTHERON能够捕捉大尺度涡拓扑和尾迹结构，平均外推MAE为0.168，误差在拍动半周期转换处达到峰值（与非线性流体-膜耦合的物理模式一致）。推理速度比DNS计算快多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: AeTHERON通过物理启发的归纳偏置，成功学习了共享高维潜在空间中的非线性流体-结构耦合，为流体-结构相互作用问题提供了高效准确的替代建模方法，具有物理可解释的误差模式。

title: Geometric Spin Degeneracy in Spin-Orbit-Free Compensated Magnets
summary: Compensated magnets with vanishing net magnetization can exhibit both pronounced spin splitting and unconventional band degeneracies. In altermagnets, such degeneracies are enforced by crystal and magnetic symmetries. In compensated ferrimagnets, however, they may arise even in the absence of the corresponding symmetry protection, raising a fundamental question about the origin of spin degeneracy in spin-orbit-free magnetic systems. Here, we develop a theoretical framework for spin-orbit-free compensated magnets in which spin degeneracies are protected by geometric constraints rather than by spin symmetry. We show that zero net magnetization imposes a strong condition for the emergence of nodes formed by formally spin-degenerate bands, even when no conventional spin symmetry is present. Our analysis, applicable in the weak-interaction regime, identifies a general mechanism for spin degeneracy beyond group-theoretical protection. The framework accounts for the unconventional spin degeneracies recently reported in compensated ferrimagnets and provides a unified description of band degeneracies across a broad class of magnetic phases with negligible spin-orbit coupling.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个理论框架，解释在自旋轨道耦合可忽略的补偿磁体中，即使没有传统自旋对称性保护，自旋简并能带节点如何通过几何约束而非群论保护出现。
AI.motivation: 补偿磁体（如反铁磁体）具有净磁化强度为零的特点，可以同时表现出显著的自旋劈裂和非传统的能带简并。这些简并通常由晶体和磁对称性保护，但在补偿亚铁磁体中，即使没有相应的对称性保护也会出现，这引发了关于自旋轨道耦合自由磁系统中自旋简并起源的基本问题。
AI.method: 开发了一个适用于自旋轨道耦合自由补偿磁体的理论框架，其中自旋简并由几何约束而非自旋对称性保护。该框架在弱相互作用机制下分析，展示了零净磁化强度如何对形式上自旋简并的能带节点出现施加强约束条件。
AI.result: 该框架识别了超越群论保护的自旋简并的一般机制，解释了最近在补偿亚铁磁体中报道的非传统自旋简并现象，并为自旋轨道耦合可忽略的广泛磁相中的能带简并提供了统一描述。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了在补偿磁体中，即使没有传统自旋对称性，零净磁化强度通过几何约束也能保护自旋简并，这为理解自旋轨道耦合自由磁系统中的能带简并提供了新视角，统一了不同磁相中的简并现象。

title: Nonequilibrium crossover in the supercritical region from quench dynamics
summary: Distinguishing different subphases in the supercritical region is a fundamental issue in statistical physics and condensed matter physics. Traditional approaches mainly rely on static thermodynamic response functions or equilibrium correlation functions, which are inherently confined to quasi-static processes. In this work, we adopt a nonequilibrium dynamical perspective to investigate the evolution of a holographic superfluid model following a rapid quench across the critical point. We find that the invasion phenomenon induced by topological defects persists in the supercritical region, and the invasion velocity exhibits a clear turning point as a function of the quench endpoint $ρ_f$. This turning point defines a new nonequilibrium supercritical crossover line. In contrast to the classical Widom line or Frenkel line, this new crossover line encodes both thermodynamic information and kinetic information, reflecting the dynamical nature of the supercritical region under nonequilibrium conditions. This study provides a novel nonequilibrium dynamical approach for characterizing supercritical subphases.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种非平衡动力学方法来研究超临界区域的子相区分，通过全息超流模型中的快速淬灭实验，发现了拓扑缺陷入侵现象在超临界区域持续存在，并基于入侵速度的转折点定义了一条新的非平衡超临界交叉线。
AI.motivation: 传统方法主要依赖静态热力学响应函数或平衡关联函数，这些方法本质上局限于准静态过程。作者希望从非平衡动力学角度研究超临界区域的相区分问题，探索在非平衡条件下表征超临界子相区的新方法。
AI.method: 采用全息超流模型，通过快速淬灭实验跨越临界点，研究系统在非平衡条件下的演化。特别关注拓扑缺陷诱导的入侵现象在超临界区域的行为，分析入侵速度随淬灭终点ρ_f的变化关系。
AI.result: 发现拓扑缺陷诱导的入侵现象在超临界区域持续存在，入侵速度随淬灭终点ρ_f的变化呈现明显的转折点。这个转折点定义了一条新的非平衡超临界交叉线，该线既包含热力学信息也包含动力学信息。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种新颖的非平衡动力学方法来表征超临界子相区，新定义的交叉线与经典的Widom线或Frenkel线不同，反映了非平衡条件下超临界区域的动力学本质。

title: X-ray Absorption and Resonant X-ray Emission at the Carbon Edge of Li$_2$CO$_3$
summary: While highly successful, density functional theory is known to have limitations owing to its neglect of many-body electron-electron interactions. This neglect leads to errors in the single-particle energies, leading to underestimated band gaps and band widths as well as errors in band alignment at interfaces. Many-body perturbation theory, in the form of the $GW$ self-energy correction, has been widely used to improve upon these short-comings. Though less well studied, the same $GW$ method is also able to predict the finite quasiparticle lifetime that is seen to cause anomalous broadening in the lowest-lying lines of valence emission spectra. Using near-edge x-ray absorption and emission, we probe the electronic structure of Li$_2$CO$_3$. Our measurements are compared to first-principles calculations, including $GW$ self-energy corrections to the single-particle energies and excitonic effects from the Bethe-Salpeter equation.

AI.tldr: 该论文使用GW方法和Bethe-Salpeter方程研究Li2CO3的电子结构，通过近边X射线吸收和发射光谱验证理论预测，发现GW修正能显著改善带隙和带宽的准确性。
AI.motivation: 密度泛函理论因忽略多体电子-电子相互作用而存在局限性，导致带隙、带宽和界面能带对齐的误差。GW自能修正可以改善这些缺陷，并预测准粒子寿命，但相关研究较少。
AI.method: 使用GW自能修正单粒子能级，结合Bethe-Salpeter方程处理激子效应，通过近边X射线吸收和发射光谱实验测量Li2CO3的电子结构，并与第一性原理计算进行比较。
AI.result: 实验测量与理论计算（包括GW修正和激子效应）进行了比较，验证了GW方法在改善带隙和带宽准确性方面的有效性，并探测了准粒子寿命导致的谱线展宽效应。
AI.conclusion: GW自能修正结合Bethe-Salpeter方程能够显著改善密度泛函理论的局限性，为准确描述Li2CO3等材料的电子结构提供了有效方法，特别是在处理准粒子寿命和激子效应方面。

title: Scaling Breakdown as a Signature of Spinon-Gauge Interaction in the Quantum Spin Liquid YbZn$_2$GaO$_5$
summary: Scaling behavior in magnetization has been reported in a wide range of quantum spin liquid (QSL) candidates and is often interpreted as evidence for scale-free spin liquid physics. Here we present a comprehensive scaling analysis of high-field magnetization measurements on the QSL material YbZn$_2$GaO$_5$. Between 5 K and 70 K, $M(H)$ displays scale invariance resembling that of a zero-field quantum critical point. Below 3 K, we observe a breakdown of this scale invariance that cannot be recovered by simply changing the critical exponents. This temperature coincides with the onset of enhanced spin correlations observed in $μ$SR measurements. Moreover, the form of the deviation from scaling is consistent with collective spinon excitations coupled via emergent gauge interactions. These results indicate that the breakdown of scaling reflects the emergence of intrinsic low-energy excitations upon entering the QSL regime. Our work clarifies that magnetic scaling is associated with quantum critical fluctuations rather than with the spin liquid phase itself, and establishes magnetization scaling as a sensitive thermodynamic probe of emergent energy scales in QSL systems.

AI.tldr: YbZn₂GaO₅的磁化测量显示，在5-70K范围内存在尺度不变性，类似零场量子临界点；但在3K以下尺度不变性被破坏，这与μSR观测到的增强自旋关联起始温度一致，表明尺度破坏反映了进入量子自旋液体（QSL）区域后本征低能激发的出现。
AI.motivation: 量子自旋液体（QSL）候选材料中广泛报道的磁化标度行为常被解释为无标度自旋液体物理的证据。本研究旨在澄清磁化标度行为与量子临界涨落的关系，而非自旋液体相本身，并建立磁化标度作为QSL系统中涌现能标的灵敏热力学探针。
AI.method: 对QSL材料YbZn₂GaO₅进行高场磁化测量，并进行全面的标度分析。将磁化数据与μSR测量结果进行对比，分析标度行为的温度依赖性。
AI.result: 在5-70K温度范围内，M(H)显示尺度不变性，类似于零场量子临界点。在3K以下，观察到尺度不变性的破坏，且无法通过简单改变临界指数来恢复。这一温度与μSR测量中观测到的增强自旋关联起始温度一致。偏离标度的形式与通过涌现规范相互作用耦合的集体自旋子激发一致。
AI.conclusion: 尺度不变性的破坏反映了进入QSL区域后本征低能激发的出现。磁化标度与量子临界涨落相关，而非自旋液体相本身。磁化标度可作为QSL系统中涌现能标的灵敏热力学探针。

title: Crystal structure effects on vortex dynamics in superconducting MgB$_2$ thin films
summary: The current-driven resistive transition is central to superconducting single-photon detectors, transition-edge sensors, and fluxonic devices. Depending on sample uniformity, dimensions, and heat removal, it can be driven by phase-slip events, flux-flow instabilities (FFI), or normal-domain formation. Here, we investigate the influence of two types of microstructural defects on vortex dynamics in MgB$_2$ films: columnar growth in textured films and buffer-layer roughness in single-crystal films. The current-voltage ($I$-$V$) curves measured at $T \approx 0.25 T_\mathrm{c}$ for both films exhibit multiple steps. Time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau simulations reproduce the major features of the experimental $I$-$V$ curves and suggest that the resistive transitions for both films are mediated by the formation and growth of normal domains rather than FFI. The single-crystal film with buffer-layer roughness exhibits superconductivity breakdown at higher currents and pinning activation energies approximately twice those of the textured film, along with more pronounced multi-step features in the $I$-$V$ curves. These features are attributed to the combination of stronger pinning induced by lateral variations of the superconducting order parameter along the MgO buffer layer and its lower thermal boundary resistance. Our results show that both the film microstructure and the film-buffer interface are critical for the resistive transition, offering insights for superconducting devices requiring controlled dissipation at high transport currents.

AI.tldr: 研究MgB₂薄膜中微结构缺陷对涡旋动力学的影响，发现薄膜微观结构和薄膜-缓冲层界面对于电阻转变至关重要，为需要在高传输电流下控制耗散的超导器件提供见解。
AI.motivation: 电流驱动的电阻转变是超导单光子探测器、转变边传感器和磁通量子器件的核心。研究微结构缺陷如何影响涡旋动力学，以理解电阻转变机制并优化超导器件性能。
AI.method: 研究两种MgB₂薄膜：具有柱状生长的织构薄膜和具有缓冲层粗糙度的单晶薄膜。在T≈0.25Tc下测量电流-电压曲线，使用时变Ginzburg-Landau模拟重现实验曲线的主要特征。
AI.result: 两种薄膜的I-V曲线都表现出多步特征，电阻转变由正常畴的形成和生长介导，而非磁通流不稳定性。具有缓冲层粗糙度的单晶薄膜在更高电流下发生超导性击穿，钉扎激活能约为织构薄膜的两倍，I-V曲线中的多步特征更明显。
AI.conclusion: 薄膜微观结构和薄膜-缓冲层界面对于电阻转变至关重要。缓冲层粗糙度引起的横向超导序参数变化导致更强的钉扎，结合较低的热边界电阻，使得单晶薄膜具有更好的性能。这些发现为需要在高传输电流下控制耗散的超导器件设计提供了重要见解。

title: NEPMaker: Active learning of neuroevolution machine learning potential for large cells
summary: Machine learning potentials (MLPs) achieve near first-principles accuracy but often fail for atomic environments outside the training distribution. Active learning can mitigate this limitation; however, its application to large-scale simulations is hindered by the prohibitive cost of labeling entire configurations. Here, we develop a D-optimality-driven active learning framework for the neuroevolution potential (NEP) implemented within the GPUMD package, named NEPMaker. Extrapolative atomic environments are identified on-the-fly and embedded into locally periodic structures, where boundary atoms are optimized to remain close to the training distribution. This strategy enables large-scale simulations to directly contribute to dataset construction, significantly reducing extrapolation errors while improving model robustness and transferability. The proposed framework provides a scalable route for constructing reliable machine learning potentials in complex materials systems, including those involving defects, interfaces, and phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于D-最优性的主动学习框架NEPMaker，用于神经进化势能，通过局部周期性结构嵌入外推原子环境，实现大规模模拟直接贡献数据集构建
AI.motivation: 机器学习势能虽然能达到接近第一性原理的精度，但在训练分布之外的原子环境中常常失效。主动学习可以缓解这一问题，但应用于大规模模拟时，标记整个构型的成本过高
AI.method: 开发了基于D-最优性的主动学习框架NEPMaker，用于神经进化势能。在模拟过程中实时识别外推原子环境，并将其嵌入到局部周期性结构中，边界原子被优化以保持在训练分布附近
AI.result: 该策略使大规模模拟能够直接贡献于数据集构建，显著减少外推误差，同时提高模型的鲁棒性和可迁移性
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂材料系统（包括缺陷、界面和相变）构建可靠的机器学习势能提供了可扩展的途径

title: Spin-Dependent Charge-State Conversion in NV Ensembles Mediated by Electron Tunneling
summary: The nitrogen-vacancy (NV) center in diamond enables optical initialization and readout of its electronic spin, forming the basis of a wide range of quantum sensing and metrology applications. A central challenge in such measurements is the coexistence of two charge states, NV- and NV0: While detection protocols rely on the spin-dependent properties of NV-, fluorescence from NV0 does not carry useful contrast and is typically removed as background, reducing the available signal. Here, we show that the origin of NV0 emission depends strongly on the excitation wavelength in nitrogen-containing diamond. Using ensembles of NV centers with varying nitrogen concentrations, we compare excitation at the NV0 zero-phonon line (ZPL) at 575 nm with the commonly used 532 nm. We find that excitation at 575 nm generates NV0 predominantly through spin-selective tunneling from the excited state of NV- to nearby nitrogen donors, such that the NV0 emission follows the spin polarization of NV-. As a result, the NV0 fluorescence contributes to the measurable spin contrast, allowing the full fluorescence signal to be used for detection. This result opens opportunities for improved sensitivity in NV-based sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 通过研究NV中心不同电荷态（NV-和NV0）的荧光特性，发现特定波长（575nm）激发下，NV0发射与NV-自旋极化相关，可利用全部荧光信号提升量子传感灵敏度。
AI.motivation: 金刚石氮空位（NV）中心在量子传感中面临一个关键挑战：存在两种电荷态（NV-和NV0）。传统上，只有NV-的荧光携带自旋对比度信息，而NV0的荧光被视为背景噪声被去除，这降低了可用信号强度。
AI.method: 使用不同氮浓度的NV中心系综，比较了在575nm（NV0零声子线）和532nm（常用波长）两种激发波长下的NV0发射特性。通过分析激发波长对NV0产生机制的影响，研究了NV0发射与NV-自旋极化的关系。
AI.result: 发现575nm激发下，NV0主要通过NV-激发态到附近氮施主的自旋选择性隧穿产生，因此NV0荧光遵循NV-的自旋极化。这使得NV0荧光能够贡献到可测量的自旋对比度中，从而可以利用全部荧光信号进行检测。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究揭示了NV0发射的物理机制，并证明通过选择合适的激发波长，可以利用全部荧光信号提升NV基量子传感的灵敏度，为改进传感应用开辟了新途径。

title: Thermodynamic conditions ensure the stability of third-order extended heat conduction
summary: In a recent work, Somogyfoki et al. (J. Non-Equilib. Thermodyn. 50, 59-76, 2025) analysed the linear stability of homogeneous equilibrium in third-order non-Fourier heat conduction within the framework of non-equilibrium thermodynamics with internal variables. They identified a stability condition, their equation (49), which could not be derived from the standard thermodynamic inequalities for the 2X2 conductivity blocks, and concluded that the Second Law does not guarantee stability in the most general case. Here we show that this conclusion was due to an overly conservative proof strategy: the standard thermodynamic conditions (concave entropy and non-negative entropy production, as expressed by the $2\times2$ block positive-definiteness inequalities (19)-(20) of the original paper) do suffice for linear stability. The key observation is that all coefficients of the dispersion polynomial remain positive for all physical wave numbers because their structure prevents positive real roots. This result confirms that thermodynamics, understood as a stability theory, ensures fundamental dynamic stability in all thermodynamically consistent third-order extended heat conduction theories. A comparison with the rate-equation approach of Giorgi, Morro and Zullo (Meccanica 59, 1757-1776, 2024) is also presented.

AI.tldr: 该论文反驳了先前研究中关于二阶热传导理论稳定性的结论，证明标准热力学条件确实能保证线性稳定性。
AI.motivation: Somogyfoki等人（2025）分析了三阶非傅里叶热传导的线性稳定性，得出结论：第二定律在最一般情况下不能保证稳定性。本文旨在纠正这一结论，证明标准热力学条件实际上足以保证稳定性。
AI.method: 通过重新分析色散多项式系数的结构，证明所有物理波数下系数都保持正值，因为其结构阻止了正实根的出现。同时与Giorgi等人的速率方程方法进行比较。
AI.result: 标准热力学条件（熵的凹性和非负熵产生，由2×2块正定性不等式表达）确实足以保证三阶扩展热传导理论的线性稳定性。先前研究中的稳定性条件（方程49）是过度保守证明策略的结果。
AI.conclusion: 热力学作为稳定性理论，在所有热力学一致的三阶扩展热传导理论中都能确保基本的动态稳定性。先前研究中关于第二定律不能保证稳定性的结论是错误的，源于过于保守的证明方法。

title: Uncovering the role of ionic doping in hydroxyapatite: The building blocks of tooth enamel and bones
summary: Hydroxyapatite (HAp) is the primary mineral component of various mineralized tissues in the human body, including bone and teeth, where it performs critical roles of structural support and load transmission. In the context of dental health, the two most crucial properties of HAp are mechanical stability, which ensures resistance to forces, and chemical stability, which preserves surface integrity in acidic environments. During early stages of human evolution, e.g. when teeth were used to crush uncooked food, mechanical stability was of paramount importance. However, with changes in diet and lifestyle, the principal origins of tooth damage and loss shifted towards bacterially mediated chemical attack, known as tooth decay, or caries. To enhance the chemical stability, ion doping has emerged as a particularly significant approach, and it lies at the focus of the present study. A Molecular Dynamics (MD) framework was developed to investigate the effects of ion doping on the chemical and mechanical stability of HAp and to identify optimal doping candidates. The framework combines conventional MD with Steered Molecular Dynamics (SMD), Thermodynamic Integration (TI) and uniaxial compression test simulations to provide comprehensive insights into the doping process. The findings revealed surface atoms as the most viable candidates for doping, as demonstrated by SMD and conventional MD simulations. Notably, TI calculations have identified magnesium ions as a better candidate among the ions considered here for enhancing the chemical stability of HAp. The results presented in this study offer valuable guidelines for synthesizing HAp-based substituent materials with properties tailored to meet the demands of modern dental applications such as implant coatings, enamel remineralization agents and restorative materials.

AI.tldr: 研究开发分子动力学框架，通过离子掺杂提高羟基磷灰石的化学稳定性，以应对现代饮食导致的龋齿问题，发现镁离子是增强化学稳定性的最佳候选。
AI.motivation: 随着人类饮食和生活方式的改变，牙齿损伤的主要原因从机械力转向细菌介导的化学侵蚀（龋齿）。羟基磷灰石作为牙齿主要矿物成分，其化学稳定性变得比机械稳定性更为重要，需要通过离子掺杂来增强抗酸性能力。
AI.method: 开发了综合分子动力学框架，结合常规MD、牵引分子动力学(SMD)、热力学积分(TI)和单轴压缩测试模拟，系统研究离子掺杂对羟基磷灰石化学和机械稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 发现表面原子是最可行的掺杂位点；在研究的离子中，镁离子被确定为增强羟基磷灰石化学稳定性的最佳候选材料。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为合成具有定制性能的羟基磷灰石基替代材料提供了有价值的指导，可满足现代牙科应用需求，如种植体涂层、牙釉质再矿化剂和修复材料。

title: Entanglement in a molecular Lieb-lattice quantum computing circuit: A tensor network study
summary: Here a finite-Lieb-lattice quantum computing circuit consisting of spin-1/2 quantum bits (qubits) and triplet couplers is designed. Important gradient - quantum entanglement - is analysed. This type of design could be realised in a vast range of molecules containing multiple radicals, in which the communications among qubits are controlled by the optically driven triplets. The von Neumann entanglement entropy, reduced density matrices, and spin-spin correlations were computed using tensor-network methods by varying the magnetic anisotropy and external magnetic field. This work uncovers the rich entanglement patterns, quantum phase transitions, and tunable spin coherence in this mixed spin system, designed for molecular spin-based quantum computing. These findings have important implications for triplet-mediated molecular self-assembly quantum computing circuit, especially for the entangling gate based on molecules. This work would provide a theoretical cornerstone for the experimental realisation of scalable molecule-based quantum computing circuits.

AI.tldr: 设计了一种基于有限Lie晶格的量子计算电路，使用自旋-1/2量子比特和三重态耦合器，通过光学驱动三重态控制量子比特间的通信，可用于含多个自由基的分子系统。
AI.motivation: 为分子自旋量子计算设计可扩展的电路架构，探索三重态介导的分子自组装量子计算电路，特别是基于分子的纠缠门实现。
AI.method: 使用张量网络方法计算冯·诺依曼纠缠熵、约化密度矩阵和自旋-自旋关联函数，通过改变磁各向异性和外加磁场来研究系统特性。
AI.result: 揭示了丰富的纠缠模式、量子相变和可调自旋相干性，发现了三重态介导的分子系统中复杂的量子行为。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为实验实现可扩展的分子基量子计算电路提供了理论基础，特别是在分子自组装量子计算领域具有重要应用前景。

title: Strong Correlation Drives Zero-Field Josephson Diode Effect
summary: The supercurrent diode effect (SDE), characterized by unequal critical currents in opposite directions, has been observed with or without magnetic fields, yet mechanisms enabling zero-field SDE without explicit symmetry breaking remain underexplored. Here we investigate a Josephson junction with strong electron-electron interaction modeled by a Hubbard $U$ term and an odd number of electrons. We find that strong correlations induce spontaneous breaking of time-reversal and mirror symmetries, forming a $\varphi$-junction with degenerate energy minima at $\pm\varphi$, resulting in zero-field Josephson diode effect (JDE) without magnetic order. Spin-orbit coupling breaks SU(2) symmetry but does not determine diode polarity, contrasting with magneto-chiral mechanisms. We further show that applying a tiny Zeeman field enables controllable JDE with sizable efficiency due to the enhancement by the strong magnetic correlation, and the JDE strength peaks when the field induces a level-crossing transition. These findings establish strong electron correlation as a distinct mechanism for nonreciprocal superconducting transport, broadening the understanding of SDE origins.

AI.tldr: 强关联电子系统中的零磁场约瑟夫森二极管效应：通过Hubbard U相互作用和奇数电子数实现自发对称性破缺，无需磁有序。
AI.motivation: 研究零磁场下超流二极管效应（SDE）的机制，特别是在没有明显对称性破缺的情况下。当前对强关联电子系统如何实现零磁场SDE的机制探索不足。
AI.method: 研究具有强电子-电子相互作用（Hubbard U项）和奇数电子的约瑟夫森结。分析强关联如何诱导时间反演和镜像对称性的自发破缺，形成具有±φ简并能量最小值的φ-结。
AI.result: 强关联诱导自发对称性破缺，产生零磁场约瑟夫森二极管效应（JDE），无需磁有序。自旋轨道耦合破坏SU(2)对称性但不决定二极管极性。施加微小塞曼场可实现可控JDE，效率显著增强，JDE强度在磁场诱导能级交叉跃迁时达到峰值。
AI.conclusion: 强电子关联是非互易超导输运的独特机制，扩展了对超流二极管效应起源的理解，为无磁有序的零磁场二极管效应提供了新途径。

title: Distributional Inverse Homogenization
summary: For many materials, macroscopic mechanical behavior is determined by an intricate microstructure. Understanding the relation between these two scales helps scientists and engineers design better materials. The relation which maps microstructure to bulk mechanical properties can be understood via the well-established theory of homogenization. However inverting the homogenization process, to recover microstructural information from measured macroscopic properties, is fraught with difficulties because of the averaging processes that underlie homogenization. Therefore, scientists and engineers usually need recourse to more invasive, often highly localized, investigations to learn about a microstructure. In this work, we develop a noninvasive methodology by which one can leverage large collections of measured bulk mechanical properties to learn information about the statistics of microstructure at a global level. We call this, distributional inverse homogenization. We study this problem in one and two dimensions, considering both periodic and stochastic homogenization. We demonstrate the methodology in the context of 2D Voronoi constructions and underpin the observed empirical success with theory in 1D. We also show how the natural spatial variability of microstructure can be exploited to gather data that enables distributional inversion. And we concurrently learn a surrogate model, approximating the homogenization map, that accelerates the resulting computations in this setting. The work formulates a new class of inverse problems, bridging ideas from probability and homogenization to facilitate the learning of microstructural material variability from macroscopic measurements.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种非侵入性的"分布逆均匀化"方法，通过大量宏观力学性质测量来学习微观结构统计信息，解决了传统逆均匀化难题。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀化理论能从微观结构预测宏观性质，但逆过程（从宏观性质恢复微观信息）因平均化过程而困难重重，通常需要侵入性局部调查。需要开发非侵入性方法来从宏观测量中学习微观结构统计信息。
AI.method: 提出"分布逆均匀化"方法，利用大量宏观力学性质测量集合来学习微观结构的统计分布。在一维和二维中研究，考虑周期和随机均匀化。在2D Voronoi构造中演示方法，在一维中提供理论支撑。利用微观结构自然空间变异性收集数据，同时学习近似均匀化映射的代理模型以加速计算。
AI.result: 成功开发了从宏观测量学习微观结构统计分布的非侵入性方法。在2D Voronoi构造中实证验证了方法的有效性，在一维中提供了理论支撑。展示了如何利用微观结构空间变异性收集数据，并构建了加速计算的代理模型。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提出了一个新的逆问题类别，结合概率论和均匀化理论，实现了从宏观测量学习微观结构材料变异性的目标，为非侵入性材料表征提供了新途径。

title: Cryogenic Loss Limits in Microwave Epitaxial AlN Acoustic Resonators
summary: Aluminum nitride (AlN)-based thin-film bulk acoustic wave resonators (FBARs) are promising compact platforms for 6G communications and quantum memory hardware, enabled by their integrable acoustic modes with high quality factors. However, temperature-dependent acoustic dissipation ultimately limits device performance. In this work, we fabricated a 16 GHz epitaxial AlN FBAR as a test platform, performed small-signal RF measurements from 6.5 K to 300 K, and developed a physics-based model to estimate the fundamental quality-factor limits of FBARs to cryogenic temperatures. The proposed model incorporates both intrinsic and extrinsic loss mechanisms, including an analytical anchor-radiation loss model for bulk acoustic wave resonators, rather than relying solely on finite-element simulations. Measured loaded quality factor (Q) decreases monotonically with temperature, from Qmax of approximately 1589 (Qf=24.79 THz) at 6.5 K to 363 at 294K (Qf=5.66 THz). This trend is consistent with the theoretical limit based on the resonator geometry and the chosen Metal-Insulator-Metal (MIM) stack. To demonstrate the generality of the physics-based framework, we further validate it by benchmarking against a 23 GHz high-overtone bulk acoustic resonator (HBAR) using previously reported data. The validated model provides a practical, transferable framework to interpret Q(T) limits in low-loss resonators by quantifying the temperature-dependent mechanisms that constrain Q, enabling the design of cryogenic microwave filter elements for superconducting quantum hardware.

AI.tldr: 研究氮化铝薄膜体声波谐振器在低温下的品质因数极限，建立物理模型预测温度相关的损耗机制，为6G通信和量子硬件设计提供指导。
AI.motivation: 氮化铝薄膜体声波谐振器是6G通信和量子存储硬件的紧凑平台，但温度相关的声学损耗限制了器件性能。需要理解低温下的品质因数极限以优化设计。
AI.method: 制备16GHz外延氮化铝薄膜体声波谐振器，在6.5K到300K温度范围内进行小信号射频测量，建立包含本征和非本征损耗机制的物理模型，包括体声波谐振器的锚点辐射损耗分析模型。
AI.result: 测量显示加载品质因数随温度单调下降，从6.5K时的约1589（Qf=24.79 THz）降至294K时的363（Qf=5.66 THz）。该趋势与基于谐振器几何结构和金属-绝缘体-金属堆栈的理论极限一致。模型通过23GHz高次谐波体声波谐振器的基准测试验证。
AI.conclusion: 验证的物理模型为解释低损耗谐振器的品质因数温度极限提供了实用、可转移的框架，能够量化限制品质因数的温度相关机制，有助于设计用于超导量子硬件的低温微波滤波元件。

title: Genuine quantum scars in Floquet chaotic many-body systems
summary: Unstable periodic orbits act as organizing structures for classical chaotic systems and underpin quantum scarring. Long known in single-particle systems, genuine quantum scars based on unstable periodic orbits have been recently extended to isolated many-body systems for time-independent Hamiltonians. Their fate under periodic driving, however, remains largely uncharted, challenged by the expectation that these systems should in general heat to infinite temperature. Here, we investigate how genuine scarring competes with the drive in a Floquet many-body system. Using chaotic spin chains, we demonstrate that Floquet states remain scarred in the high-frequency limit. Beyond this static correspondence, we uncover additional, driving-induced Floquet scars with no static analog. We construct a rich dynamical stability diagram with intermediate-frequency regimes of enhanced and quenched scarring, which we understand with a classical analysis of the Lyapunov exponent. Our results position Floquet systems as a natural platform for tuning the scarring behavior of quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: Floquet驱动系统中量子疤痕的稳定性研究：发现了高频极限下的疤痕态、驱动诱导的新型疤痕，以及中间频率区域的疤痕增强/抑制现象
AI.motivation: 研究量子疤痕在周期驱动多体系统中的命运，挑战了这类系统通常会加热到无限温度的预期，探索Floquet系统作为调控量子多体系统疤痕行为的平台
AI.method: 使用混沌自旋链模型，通过经典李雅普诺夫指数分析，研究Floquet多体系统中的疤痕行为，包括高频极限和中间频率区域
AI.result: 发现Floquet态在高频极限下保持疤痕特性；发现了无静态对应物的驱动诱导Floquet疤痕；构建了丰富的动力学稳定性相图，显示中间频率区域存在疤痕增强和抑制现象
AI.conclusion: Floquet系统可作为调控量子多体系统疤痕行为的自然平台，为理解周期驱动下量子疤痕的稳定性提供了新视角

title: Finetuning-Free Diffusion Model with Adaptive Constraint Guidance for Inorganic Crystal Structure Generation
comment: Full article including supplementary information, 55 pages, 9 figures
summary:
The discovery of inorganic crystal structures with targeted properties is a significant challenge in materials science. Generative models, especially state-of-the-art diffusion models, offer the promise of modeling complex data distributions and proposing novel, realistic samples. However, current generative AI models still struggle to produce diverse, original, and reliable structures of experimentally achievable materials suitable for high-stakes applications.
  In this work, we propose a generative machine learning framework based on diffusion models with adaptive constraint guidance, which enables the incorporation of user-defined physical and chemical constraints during the generation process. This approach is designed to be practical and interpretable for human experts, allowing transparent decision-making and expert-driven exploration. To ensure the robustness and validity of the generated candidates, we introduce a multi-step validation pipeline that combines graph neural network estimators trained to achieve DFT-level accuracy and convex hull analysis for assessing thermodynamic stability. Our approach has been tested and validated on several classical examples of inorganic families of compounds, as case studies. As a consequence, these preliminary results demonstrate our framework's ability to generate thermodynamically plausible crystal structures that satisfy targeted geometric constraints across diverse inorganic chemical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的自适应约束引导生成框架，用于生成满足物理化学约束的无机晶体结构，并通过多步验证确保热力学稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI模型难以生成多样化、原创且可靠的实验可实现材料结构，特别是在高风险应用中。需要一种能够结合专家知识和物理约束的实用方法。
AI.method: 基于扩散模型的自适应约束引导框架，允许在生成过程中融入用户定义的物理化学约束。引入多步验证管道，结合达到DFT精度的图神经网络估计器和凸包分析来评估热力学稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个无机化合物家族案例研究中测试验证，初步结果表明框架能够生成满足目标几何约束的热力学合理晶体结构。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为材料科学中目标属性晶体结构的发现提供了实用、可解释的生成方法，支持专家驱动的探索和透明决策。

title: Superconductivity near two-dimensional Van Hove singularities: a determinant quantum Monte Carlo study
summary: The superconducting transition temperature $T_c$ of the two-dimensional attractive Hubbard model is computed in the vicinity of both ordinary (logarithmic) and higher-order (power-law) Van Hove singularities using determinant quantum Monte Carlo simulations. For interaction strengths $|U| \lesssim W/3$, where $W$ is the electronic bandwidth, $T_c$ is enhanced in the neighborhood of the Van Hove point, albeit more weakly than expected from weak-coupling BCS theory. Enhancing the Van Hove singularity from logarithmic to power-law yields only a minor additional enhancement of $T_c$. For $|U| \gtrsim W/3$, the maximum $T_c$ shifts away from the Van Hove point and instead occurs at a density unrelated to any features in the non-interacting density of states, consistent with a strong-coupling interpretation. We find that the maximal $T_c$ in the model is achieved at intermediate $U$ and at a density away from the Van Hove point.

AI.tldr: 二维吸引Hubbard模型的超导转变温度Tc在Van Hove奇点附近被计算，发现Tc在弱耦合时在Van Hove点附近增强但弱于BCS理论预期，强耦合时最大Tc出现在远离Van Hove点的密度处。
AI.motivation: 研究二维吸引Hubbard模型中超导转变温度Tc与Van Hove奇点的关系，探索不同相互作用强度下Tc的最大化条件，理解弱耦合和强耦合机制对超导转变的影响。
AI.method: 使用行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟计算二维吸引Hubbard模型的超导转变温度Tc，分别在普通对数型和高阶幂律型Van Hove奇点附近进行分析，考虑不同相互作用强度|U|。
AI.result: 对于|U|≲W/3的弱相互作用，Tc在Van Hove点附近增强但弱于弱耦合BCS理论预期；将Van Hove奇点从对数型增强为幂律型仅略微提高Tc。对于|U|≧W/3的强相互作用，最大Tc出现在远离Van Hove点的密度处，与强耦合机制一致。模型中的最大Tc出现在中等U值和远离Van Hove点的密度处。
AI.conclusion: 二维吸引Hubbard模型中，超导转变温度Tc在弱耦合时受Van Hove奇点影响但增强有限，在强耦合时最大Tc出现在远离Van Hove点的密度处，表明强耦合机制在优化超导转变中起关键作用。

title: Symmetry-protected coexistence of a nodal surface and multiple types of Weyl fermions in $P6_3$-$\text{B}_{30}$
summary: The coexistence of topological states with different dimensionalities in a single crystalline system offers a unique platform to study the interplay of distinct fermionic excitations. Here, integrating first-principles calculations with symmetry analysis, we propose the three-dimensional boron allotrope $P6_3$-$\text{B}_{30}$ as an ideal, structurally stable candidate for exploring multidimensional topological physics. Benefiting from the practically negligible spin-orbit coupling of the light-element framework, $P6_3$-$\text{B}_{30}$ operates as a pristine spinless topological semimetal. We show that the combined time-reversal and twofold screw symmetry ($\mathcal{T}S_{2z}$) enforces a robust two-dimensional nodal surface on the $k_z = π$ plane via a Kramers-like degeneracy. Concurrently, the system hosts a diverse set of zero-dimensional Weyl fermions -- including an unconventional double-Weyl point ($\mathcal{C} = -2$), conventional Type-I WPs ($\mathcal{C} = -1$), and completely tilted Type-II WPs ($\mathcal{C} = +1$) -- emerging at the high-symmetry points $Γ$ and K, as well as along the H-K path, protected by $C_6$ and $C_3$ crystalline rotational symmetries. Crucially, the substantial momentum-space separation between the nodal surface and Weyl points allows for their unambiguous independent resolution. Calculations of the (100) surface states reveal distinct, nontrivial Fermi arcs connecting Weyl nodes of opposite chirality. This work establishes $P6_3$-$\text{B}_{30}$ as a compelling material platform for investigating the physics of multidimensional hybrid topological fermions and their interplay.

AI.tldr: P6₃-B₃₀是一种三维硼同素异形体，同时具有二维节面和一维外尔费米子，为研究多维拓扑物理提供了理想平台。
AI.motivation: 研究不同维度拓扑态在单一晶体系统中的共存现象，为探索不同费米子激发之间的相互作用提供独特平台。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算和对称性分析，研究P6₃-B₃₀的结构稳定性和拓扑性质，通过时间反演和螺旋对称性分析节面，通过晶体旋转对称性分析外尔点。
AI.result: P6₃-B₃₀是一种无自旋拓扑半金属，具有：1) k_z=π平面的二维节面；2) 多种零维外尔费米子（包括非常规双外尔点、常规Type-I和完全倾斜Type-II外尔点）；3) 节面与外尔点在动量空间充分分离，可独立分辨；4) (100)表面态显示连接相反手性外尔点的非平庸费米弧。
AI.conclusion: P6₃-B₃₀为研究多维混合拓扑费米子物理及其相互作用提供了一个有吸引力的材料平台。

title: Sub-nm range momentum-dependent exciton transfer from a 2D semiconductor to graphene
summary: Van der Waals heterostructures made from atomically thin transition metal dichalcogenides (TMD) and graphene have emerged as a building block for optoelectronic devices. Such systems are also uniquely poised to investigate interfacial coupling as well as photoinduced charge and energy transfer in the 2D limit. Recent works have revealed efficient photoluminescence quenching and picosecond transfer in TMD/graphene heterostructures. However, key questions regarding the transfer mechanisms remain. Here, employing time-resolved photoluminescence spectroscopy with 1~ps resolution in MoSe$_2$ monolayer directly coupled to a few-layer ``staircase-like'' graphene flake, we consistently observe an exciton transfer time of $\approx 2.5~\mathrm{ps}$ at cryogenic temperature that is marginally affected by the number of graphene layers. Remarkably, exciton transfer vanishes in samples consisting in an MoSe$_2$ monolayer separated from graphene by a thin dielectric spacer of hexagonal boron nitride, as soon as the spacer thickness reaches 1~nm. These results suggest that charge tunnelling processes govern exciton dynamics. Other mechanisms mediated the dipolar interactions (Förster-type energy transfer) have no measurable impact on bright excitons (with near-zero center of mass momentum) but may accelerate the relaxation of finite momentum ``hot'' excitons, leading to larger photoluminescence quenching than anticipated based on the measurements of the photoluminescence decay rates. Our work provides important insights into charge and energy transfer in van der Waals materials with direct implications for energy harvesting and funneling.

AI.tldr: MoSe₂/石墨烯异质结中激子转移时间约2.5ps，主要由电荷隧穿机制主导，而非偶极相互作用
AI.motivation: 研究二维过渡金属硫族化合物/石墨烯异质结中的界面耦合和光诱导电荷/能量转移机制，解决现有研究中关于转移机制的关键问题
AI.method: 使用1ps时间分辨光致发光光谱技术，研究MoSe₂单层直接耦合到多层"阶梯状"石墨烯薄片的异质结，以及通过六方氮化硼介质层分隔的样品
AI.result: 在低温下观察到约2.5ps的激子转移时间，基本不受石墨烯层数影响；当六方氮化硼隔离层厚度达到1nm时，激子转移完全消失；表明电荷隧穿过程主导激子动力学
AI.conclusion: 电荷隧穿机制主导范德华材料中的激子转移，而偶极相互作用对亮激子影响可忽略，但对热激子弛豫有加速作用，这对能量收集和传输应用有重要启示

title: Global Oscillations in Depinning Models with Aging
summary: We propose a model that extends the standard depinning paradigm by incorporating an aging mechanism into the local pinning force. This favors oscillations between a stuck state of large pinning, and a slipping state of smaller pinning. We show that for mean field interactions between sites this mechanism can lead to the appearance of ``king avalanches" and global instabilities, producing a global oscillatory stick-slip stress regime. We construct the phase diagram for this mean field case and identify regions of smooth dynamics, pure stick-slip, and bistability. Crucially, when considering two-dimensional systems with short-range interactions we find that states of global stress oscillation persist, but in contrast to the mean field case, no system-size avalanches appear. Instead, we observe alternating temporal intervals of larger and lower avalanche activity that correlate with the stress oscillations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种扩展标准脱钉模型的新机制，通过引入局部钉扎力的老化效应，导致系统在强钉扎的"卡住"状态和弱钉扎的"滑移"状态之间振荡。研究发现，在平均场相互作用下会出现"王者雪崩"和全局振荡的粘滑应力状态，而在二维短程相互作用系统中，全局应力振荡持续存在但无系统尺度雪崩，而是出现与应力振荡相关的雪崩活动交替区间。
AI.motivation: 标准脱钉范式无法解释某些材料中观察到的应力振荡和粘滑行为。研究旨在通过引入钉扎力老化机制来扩展现有模型，以更好地描述实际材料中观察到的复杂动力学行为，特别是系统在卡住和滑移状态之间的振荡现象。
AI.method: 提出扩展的脱钉模型，在局部钉扎力中引入老化机制。分别研究两种相互作用情况：1) 平均场相互作用情况，构建相图分析不同动力学区域；2) 二维系统短程相互作用情况，分析其动力学特征并与平均场结果对比。
AI.result: 在平均场情况下，系统表现出三种不同区域：平滑动力学、纯粘滑行为和双稳态。出现"王者雪崩"和全局振荡的粘滑应力状态。在二维短程相互作用系统中，全局应力振荡持续存在，但无系统尺度雪崩，而是观察到与应力振荡相关的雪崩活动交替区间。
AI.conclusion: 钉扎力老化机制能够解释材料中观察到的应力振荡和粘滑行为。平均场和短程相互作用系统表现出不同的雪崩特征：平均场系统出现系统尺度雪崩，而二维短程系统则表现为雪崩活动的周期性变化。这种机制为理解复杂材料动力学提供了新的理论框架。

title: Probing local coordination and halide miscibility in single-, double-, and triple-halide perovskites using EXAFS
summary: Lead-halide perovskites are a promising material platform as semiconductors in next-generation solar cells because of their solution processability, defect tolerance, and tunable optoelectronic properties. While iodide-bromide perovskite compositions have shown promise as wide bandgap absorbers, they also suffer from significant instabilities under operating conditions. Triple-halide perovskites, where chloride is additionally incorporated, have demonstrated improved stability and performance over their double-halide counterparts; however, relatively little is understood about halide miscibility and incorporation in these novel materials. While bulk metrics such as lattice spacing and optical bandgap can be consistent with incorporation of chloride into a single phase, these results are not sufficient to fully describe the material as having homogeneous mixing on the X site. This uncertainty motivates the use of a more local probe to study short-range halide coordination and illuminate the role of chloride in triple-halide perovskites. We use cryogenic X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS) to characterize lead-halide bonds in a range of single-, double-, and triple-halide perovskite compositions. We show formation of a single-phase triple-halide perovskite whose miscibility is mediated by bromide content. We identify signatures of halide mixing from the Pb L3-edge EXAFS of mixed double- and triple-halide perovskites using both quantitative fits and Cauchy wavelet transforms. Finally, using wavelet transforms of the Br K-edge EXAFS, we demonstrate via forward scattering amplified 3rd shell halide-halide interactions that all three halides coordinate at short range in a fully mixed perovskite phase. These results are a step forward in the understanding of local structure that is required to fully describe and optimize halide incorporation for novel perovskite compositions.

AI.tldr: 使用低温X射线吸收光谱研究三卤化物钙钛矿中卤化物的局部配位结构，发现溴含量介导卤化物混溶性，证实三种卤化物在短程范围内完全混合形成单相材料。
AI.motivation: 虽然碘-溴钙钛矿作为宽带隙吸收体有前景，但在工作条件下存在不稳定性问题。三卤化物钙钛矿（加入氯化物）显示出更好的稳定性和性能，但对其卤化物混溶性和掺入机制了解有限。传统体相表征方法（如晶格间距和光学带隙）不足以确定卤化物在X位点是否均匀混合，需要局部探针研究短程卤化物配位结构。
AI.method: 使用低温X射线吸收光谱（XAS）表征一系列单、双和三卤化物钙钛矿中的铅-卤键。通过Pb L3-edge EXAFS的定量拟合和柯西小波变换分析卤化物混合特征，利用Br K-edge EXAFS的小波变换通过前向散射放大的第三壳层卤-卤相互作用验证短程配位。
AI.result: 发现溴含量介导形成单相三卤化物钙钛矿。从混合双卤和三卤化物钙钛矿的Pb L3-edge EXAFS中识别出卤化物混合特征。通过Br K-edge EXAFS的小波变换证明三种卤化物在短程范围内完全配位，形成完全混合的钙钛矿相。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果推进了对局部结构的理解，为全面描述和优化新型钙钛矿组成中的卤化物掺入提供了重要基础，有助于开发更稳定的钙钛矿太阳能电池材料。

title: Extreme Terahertz Nonlinear Phononics by Coherence-Imprinted Control of Hybrid Order
summary: Coherent control of quantum materials has progressed along two major fronts: nonlinear phononics, which reshapes lattices to induce emergent states, and Floquet engineering, which tailors electronic band reconstruction via time-periodic driving. Both mechanisms face fundamental limitations at terahertz (THz) frequencies: phononic nonlinearities are intrinsically weak in standard lattices, while electronic Floquet states are often constrained by rapid decoherence upon light-off and by a scarcity of coherence-resolved, multi-correlation probes beyond (quasi-)stationary band structures. Here we report an extreme THz nonlinear-phononics mechanism in $\text{Ta}_\text{2}\text{NiSe}_\text{5}$, where a highly susceptible non-equilibrium electronic correlation bath dramatically amplifies lattice nonlinearities under coherent driving. Utilizing THz two-dimensional spectroscopy as a coherence-tomography tool, we resolve an exceptionally rich landscape of approximately 30 distinct multi-order quantum pathways, including high-harmonic phonon generation, multi-quantum coherences, and multi-wave anharmonic cross-mode mixing. The density and complexity of this extreme manifold establishes a new benchmark for THz nonlinear phononics, as the multi-order quantum pathways surpass the limits of conventional lattice responses. These high-order signals collapse above ~100~K, defining an electronic correlation scale of a coherence-imprinted hybrid electronic-phonon order that governs the sustainability of high-order quantum correlations and nonlinear pathways beyond linear and equilibrium responses. Our results establish a route for correlation-boosted, phonon-anchored periodic Hamiltonian engineering and for certifying such periodically-driven states via multi-correlation coherence tomography.

AI.tldr: 该论文报道了一种极端太赫兹非线性声子机制，通过电子关联浴大幅放大晶格非线性，利用太赫兹二维光谱作为相干层析工具，解析了约30种不同的多阶量子路径，为THz非线性声子学设立了新基准。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性声子学和Floquet工程在太赫兹频率面临根本限制：标准晶格中声子非线性弱，电子Floquet态在光关闭后快速退相干，且缺乏相干分辨的多关联探测手段。需要发展新机制来克服这些限制。
AI.method: 使用太赫兹二维光谱作为相干层析工具，研究Ta₂NiSe₅材料中电子关联浴对晶格非线性的放大效应，解析多阶量子路径，包括高次谐波声子生成、多量子相干和多波非谐交叉模式混合。
AI.result: 发现了约30种不同的多阶量子路径，建立了THz非线性声子学的新基准。这些高次信号在约100K以上消失，定义了电子关联尺度，该尺度控制着高次量子关联和非线性路径的可持续性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为关联增强、声子锚定的周期性哈密顿量工程开辟了路径，并通过多关联相干层析技术为验证此类周期性驱动态提供了方法。

title: Anomalous Low-temperature Magnetotransport in Kagome Metal CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$ under Pressure
summary: As a unique kagome superconductor displaying clear signatures of strong electronic correlations, CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$ has drawn much attention. Its rich temperature-pressure phase diagram features intertwined orders including pressure-induced superconductivity and two density-wave-like phases, making it an outstanding platform to explore the complex coexistence and competition of multiple quantum orders. At around 30 K, which we designate as $T_3$, a possible anomaly manifesting as a hump in the resistivity has been observed, yet its nature remains largely unexplored due to limited supporting evidence from other probes. Here, we conducted systematic magnetotransport experiments under hydrostatic pressure to investigate the nature of this anomaly. Our results reveal an abundance of intriguing magnetotransport signatures below $T_3$, including a non-trivial temperature dependence of the Hall coefficient, multi-band characteristics, and pressure-enhanced anomalous-Hall-like effect. These signatures bear resemblance to those observed in the charge-density-wave state in the sister compound CsV$_3$Sb$_5$. These findings suggest the possibility of an additional, exotic electronic order in CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$, calling for further detailed investigations.

AI.tldr: CsCr₃Sb₅在30K附近出现电阻异常，磁输运实验揭示其具有多带特征、霍尔系数非平凡温度依赖性和压力增强的反常霍尔效应，暗示可能存在新的奇异电子序。
AI.motivation: CsCr₃Sb₅作为独特的kagome超导体，具有丰富的温度-压力相图，包含超导和两个类密度波相。在30K附近观察到的电阻异常（T₃）性质不明，需要系统研究来揭示其本质。
AI.method: 在静水压力下进行系统的磁输运实验，包括电阻率、霍尔效应等测量，研究T₃以下区域的输运特性。
AI.result: 在T₃以下发现了丰富的磁输运特征：霍尔系数的非平凡温度依赖性、多带特征、压力增强的反常霍尔效应。这些特征与姐妹化合物CsV₃Sb₅中的电荷密度波态相似。
AI.conclusion: CsCr₃Sb₅在T₃处可能存在额外的奇异电子序，需要进一步详细研究来确认其性质。

title: Emergence of Nontrivial Topological Magnon States in Skyrmionium Lattices with Zero Topological Charge
summary: We predict the emergence of nontrivial topological magnon states in the skyrmionium lattice with zero topological charge. We propose the concept of weighted magnetic flux, which provides a clear physical picture for this anomalous phenomenon. We also map the skyrmionium lattice onto the Haldane model, offering an alternative framework for interpreting this. Our findings challenge the conventional wisdom that such states are linked to nonzero topological charge in skyrmion lattices, offering a new perspective in topological magnonics. To facilitate experimental validation, we propose two methods for preparing the skyrmionium lattice and calculate the induced magnon thermal Hall conductivity, which is a key indicator in transport measurements.

AI.tldr: 在拓扑电荷为零的skyrmionium晶格中预测了非平凡拓扑磁子态，提出了加权磁通概念，挑战了传统认知
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观念：传统认为非平凡拓扑磁子态与skyrmion晶格的非零拓扑电荷相关，但本文探索在拓扑电荷为零的skyrmionium晶格中是否也能出现此类态
AI.method: 提出加权磁通概念为物理图像，将skyrmionium晶格映射到Haldane模型，提出两种实验制备方法，计算磁子热霍尔电导率作为实验验证指标
AI.result: 成功预测了skyrmionium晶格中的非平凡拓扑磁子态，建立了加权磁通概念，提供了Haldane模型映射框架，计算了可观测的热霍尔电导率
AI.conclusion: 拓扑电荷为零的skyrmionium晶格也能支持非平凡拓扑磁子态，挑战了传统认知，为拓扑磁子学提供了新视角，提出的实验方法为验证提供了途径

title: First Passage Times for Variable-Order Time-Fractional Diffusion
summary: We derive the asymptotic first passage time (FPT) distribution for space-dependent variable-order time-fractional diffusion, where the fractional exponent $α(x)$ varies with position. For any sufficiently smooth $α(x)$ on a finite domain with absorbing and reflecting boundaries, we show that the survival probability decays as $Ψ(t)\sim C\,t^{-α_*}/(\ln t)^ν$, where $α_*$ is the minimum value of the fractional exponent and $ν$ is determined by the location and shape of the minimum. For a constant fractional exponent $ν=0$ and this provides a theoretical prediction that can identify spatially heterogeneous anomalous transport in experiments. We validate the theory against exact Laplace-space solutions and Monte Carlo simulations for linear and nonlinear profiles of $α(x)$.

AI.tldr: 研究推导了空间依赖变阶时间分数扩散的首达时分布渐近行为，发现生存概率以幂律衰减，指数由分数阶的最小值决定
AI.motivation: 研究空间依赖的变阶时间分数扩散过程的首达时分布，这类模型能更准确地描述实际物理和生物系统中的非均匀异常扩散现象
AI.method: 推导了空间依赖变阶时间分数扩散的首达时分布渐近解，通过拉普拉斯空间精确解和蒙特卡洛模拟验证理论结果
AI.result: 生存概率衰减为Ψ(t)∼C t^{-α_*}/(ln t)^ν，其中α_*是分数阶指数的最小值，ν由最小值的位置和形状决定
AI.conclusion: 该理论为实验识别空间异质异常输运提供了理论预测，并通过线性非线性α(x)剖面验证了理论的有效性

title: Strain-Mediated Lattice Reconstruction Enhances Ferromagnetism in Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2 van der Waals Heterobilayers
summary: Van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures enable tailored electronic and magnetic phases by stacking atomically thin layers with pristine interfaces. Here, we investigate fully 2D Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2 heterostructures and identify a strong enhancement of ferromagnetism in Cr2Ge2Te6 (CGT). Magnetotransport measurements across multiple devices with WTe2 thicknesses ranging from monolayer to bulk reveal a robust anomalous Hall effect together with a more than twofold increase of the Curie temperature and substantially enhanced coercive fields. Interface microscopy confirms chemically abrupt vdW interfaces with no detectable interdiffusion, while control experiments rule out processing- or stray-field-induced artifacts. Our experiments and theoretical calculations demonstrate that interfacial charge transfer renders CGT conductive and that proximity-induced lattice distortions in CGT enhance exchange and magnetocrystalline anisotropy. These results establish strain-mediated lattice reconstruction as a strategy for engineering high-temperature magnetic order in 2D heterostructures and clarify that modifications within the magnetic layer itself can govern proximity effects in vdW stacks.

AI.tldr: 通过构建Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2范德华异质结，界面电荷转移和晶格畸变显著增强了CGT的铁磁性，居里温度提高两倍以上，为二维异质结中的高温磁性调控提供了新策略。
AI.motivation: 研究二维范德华异质结中界面效应如何调控磁性材料的性质，探索增强二维铁磁体居里温度和磁性能的新方法。
AI.method: 制备不同WTe2厚度（单层到体材料）的Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2异质结，通过磁输运测量（异常霍尔效应）、界面显微技术（确认化学锐利界面）和理论计算分析界面效应。
AI.result: 发现CGT的铁磁性显著增强：居里温度提高两倍以上，矫顽场大幅增加，异常霍尔效应稳定。界面电荷转移使CGT导电，晶格畸变增强了交换相互作用和磁晶各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 应变介导的晶格重构是调控二维异质结高温磁序的有效策略，磁性层自身的结构变化主导了范德华堆叠中的邻近效应。

title: Giant Room-Temperature Third-Order Electrical Transport in a Thin-Film Altermagnet Candidate
comment: 68 pages, 19 figures, published at Nature Nanotechnology
summary: Quantum geometry, a quantum mechanical quantity comprised of Berry curvature and quantum metric, describes the geometric structure of the electronic bands in solids. The correlation between nontrivial quantum geometry and quantum materials leads to new findings in condensed matter systems. Here we demonstrate that altermagnets, with spontaneously broken time-reversal (T)- half-lattice-translation and parity-time symmetry, host both T-odd and T-even quantum geometric quantities that simultaneously manifest themselves despite the vanishing net magnetization. Consequently, giant room-temperature third-order electrical transport responses with sizable quantum geometric contributions are observed in (101)-oriented RuO2 thin films, an altermagnetic candidate; in particular, the third-order Hall effect is intimately correlated with altermagnetic order and can serve as a promising tool for detecting the Neel vector. Our work not only supports the existence of altermagnetism in 8-nm-thick RuO2 thin films, but also shows altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring quantum geometry and constructing quantum electronic and spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 反铁磁体RuO₂薄膜中量子几何效应导致巨室温三阶电输运响应，三阶霍尔效应可作为探测奈尔矢量的工具
AI.motivation: 探索反铁磁体（具有自发破缺的时间反演、半晶格平移和宇称时间对称性）中的量子几何效应，及其在量子材料和器件中的应用潜力
AI.method: 在(101)取向的RuO₂薄膜（反铁磁候选材料）中测量三阶电输运响应，分析其量子几何贡献，特别是三阶霍尔效应与反铁磁序的关联
AI.result: 观察到巨室温三阶电输运响应，三阶霍尔效应与反铁磁序密切相关，可作为探测奈尔矢量的有效工具，证实了8nm厚RuO₂薄膜中存在反铁磁性
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁体不仅是探索量子几何的理想平台，也为构建量子电子和自旋电子器件提供了新途径

title: Coherent control of thermal transport with pillar-based phononic crystals
summary: Two-dimensional phononic crystals (PnCs) formed by a periodic array of holes in a suspended membrane have previously been used to coherently control thermal conductance at low temperatures by modifying the phonon dispersion, thereby altering the phonon group velocities and the density of states. Here, in contrast, we demonstrate that PnCs formed by a periodic array of Al pillars on an uncut \SiN membrane can also be used to achieve similar coherent control. We have measured and simulated the thermal conductance of four pillar-based PnCs with different lattice constants ranging from 0.3 to 5 $μ$m at sub-Kelvin temperatures, showing a strong up to an order of magnitude reduction in thermal conductance compared to an unaltered membrane. For the larger lattice constants $> 1 $ $μ$m, however, the experiments do not agree with the coherent theory simulations, which we interpret as a breakdown of coherence induced by increasingly effective diffusive scattering due to the roughness of the Al pillar surfaces.

AI.tldr: 二维声子晶体通过周期性排列的铝柱在氮化硅膜上也能实现热导的相干控制，但大晶格常数下实验与理论不符，表明相干性因铝柱表面粗糙度引起的扩散散射而破坏。
AI.motivation: 传统上通过膜上周期性孔洞形成的二维声子晶体可在低温下相干控制热导，本研究旨在探索铝柱周期性排列在完整膜上是否也能实现类似相干控制效果。
AI.method: 在未切割的氮化硅膜上制备四种不同晶格常数（0.3-5 μm）的铝柱周期性阵列声子晶体，在亚开尔文温度下测量热导，并与相干理论模拟进行对比。
AI.result: 铝柱声子晶体可实现高达一个数量级的热导降低，但晶格常数大于1 μm时，实验结果与相干理论模拟不符，表明相干性被铝柱表面粗糙度引起的扩散散射破坏。
AI.conclusion: 铝柱声子晶体也能实现热导的相干控制，但大晶格常数下表面粗糙度会破坏相干性，导致扩散散射主导热输运过程。

title: Role of volatility mixing in wealth condensation transition
summary: We study the role of heterogeneous volatility in a networked wealth dynamics model and its impact on the wealth condensation transition. Extending the Bouchaud--M{é}zard framework, we introduce binary volatility in networks and investigate how its configuration affects the effective power-law tail exponent of the wealth distribution. Using a stochastic block model, we control the mixing between volatility groups and show that the effective exponent is governed not only by the global parameter $Λ=2J/β^2$ but also by the volatility configuration in the network. We find that local interactions between nodes with different volatility induce a neutralization of group-wise exponents, which lowers the aggregate tail exponent and can drive a condensation transition across $γ_{\rm c}=2$. Our results identify volatility mixing as another control mechanism for wealth condensation and highlight the importance of noise heterogeneity in nonequilibrium systems on networks.

AI.tldr: 研究网络财富动力学模型中异质波动性的作用及其对财富凝聚转变的影响，发现波动性混合可以降低财富分布的尾部指数，驱动凝聚转变。
AI.motivation: 研究网络财富动力学中异质波动性的作用，探索波动性配置如何影响财富分布的尾部指数和财富凝聚转变。
AI.method: 扩展Bouchaud-Mézard框架，在网络中引入二元波动性，使用随机块模型控制波动性组之间的混合，分析波动性配置对有效幂律尾部指数的影响。
AI.result: 发现有效指数不仅受全局参数Λ=2J/β²控制，还受网络中波动性配置的影响；不同波动性节点间的局部相互作用导致组间指数中和，降低总体尾部指数，可驱动γ_c=2处的凝聚转变。
AI.conclusion: 波动性混合是财富凝聚的另一个控制机制，突显了网络中非平衡系统噪声异质性的重要性。

title: A Generalized Method for Spatial Operations on Physical Properties of Matter
summary: The physical properties of matter are typically described by coefficient matrices governed by crystal symmetry. Applying spatial operations, such as rotation, inversion, and mirror, to these matrices provides an effective approach for investigating material properties. However, the diversity of coefficient matrix types complicates their transformation via simple matrix multiplication, and existing methods suffer from cumbersome notation, high computational cost, and lack of intuitive interpretation. Moreover, as coefficient matrices grow in size, conventional approaches become increasingly inadequate. We present a generalized ``input-coefficient-output (ICO)" approach for constructing spatial operation matrices applicable to coefficient matrices across diverse physical systems, including but not limited to high-order nonlinear optics, elastic mechanics, electricity and magnetism. Our approach offers a concise formalism that enables intuitive reasoning about spatial transformations while delegating intensive computations to computational tools, which is analogous to the role of Feynman diagrams in facilitating understanding in physics. This method also offers valuable insights for future theoretical and experimental research.

AI.tldr: 提出ICO方法，用于构建适用于各种物理系统系数矩阵的空间操作矩阵，解决传统方法在符号复杂、计算成本高和直观性差方面的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理不同物理系统的系数矩阵空间变换时存在诸多问题：符号表示繁琐、计算成本高、缺乏直观解释，且随着矩阵规模增大，传统方法越来越不适用。
AI.method: 提出通用的"输入-系数-输出(ICO)"方法，构建适用于各种物理系统系数矩阵的空间操作矩阵，包括高阶非线性光学、弹性力学、电磁学等领域。
AI.result: ICO方法提供了简洁的形式化表示，能够直观推理空间变换，同时将密集计算委托给计算工具，类似于费曼图在物理学中的辅助理解作用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来理论和实验研究提供了有价值的见解，能够有效处理各种物理系统的系数矩阵空间变换问题。

title: Revisiting 9Be Nuclear Magnetic Resonance in UBe13: Itinerant-Localized Duality and Possible Fermi Surface Reconstruction at High Magnetic Field
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in J. Phys. Soc. Jpn
summary: We report on new results of 9Be nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) measurements conducted on a single crystal of the heavy fermion superconductor UBe13. Our previous 2007 study [J. Phys. Soc. Jpn. 76 204705 (2007)] determined NMR and electric field gradient (EFG) parameters that successfully reproduced the NMR spectra at low magnetic fields. However, these parameters did not accurately describe the angular dependence of the NMR spectra at high magnetic fields. To address this discrepancy, we have now performed a more comprehensive investigation, measuring the magnetic field dependence of the 9Be-NMR spectra across a field range of 0.5 T to 8 T, as well as the magnetic field angle dependence at 0.5 T and 6 T. Through detailed simulations that take into account the non-symmorphic space group of UBe13, we have determined a new set of parameters capable of reproducing the complex NMR line profiles observed at high magnetic fields. Notably, our analysis reveals the significant influence of classical dipolar fields. A comparison between the Knight shift (KS) and the classical dipolar shift provides microscopic supporting evidence for the nature of an itinerant-localized duality in UBe13. Furthermore, the magnetic field dependence of the KS exhibits anomalies around 6 T, suggesting a reconstruction of a part of the multiple Fermi surfaces in the high magnetic field region.

AI.tldr: 通过更全面的9Be核磁共振测量和考虑非对称空间群的模拟，确定了能准确描述UBe13高磁场下NMR谱的新参数，揭示了经典偶极场的重要影响，为UBe13的巡游-局域二重性提供了微观证据，并发现6T附近Knight shift异常表明高磁场下多重费米面的重构。
AI.motivation: 先前研究确定的NMR和EFG参数能准确描述低磁场下的NMR谱，但无法准确描述高磁场下NMR谱的角度依赖性。为了解决这一差异，需要对高磁场下的NMR行为进行更全面的研究。
AI.method: 在UBe13单晶上进行了9Be核磁共振测量，测量了0.5T到8T磁场范围内的磁场依赖性，以及在0.5T和6T下的磁场角度依赖性。通过考虑UBe13非对称空间群的详细模拟，确定了能重现高磁场下复杂NMR线型的新参数。
AI.result: 确定了能准确描述高磁场下NMR谱的新参数集。分析揭示了经典偶极场的显著影响。Knight shift与经典偶极位移的比较为UBe13的巡游-局域二重性提供了微观支持证据。Knight shift在6T附近表现出异常，表明高磁场下多重费米面的部分重构。
AI.conclusion: 通过全面的NMR测量和考虑晶体对称性的模拟，成功解释了高磁场下的NMR行为，为理解UBe13中巡游-局域二重性提供了重要证据，并揭示了高磁场下费米面重构的可能性。

title: Optimal Majoranas in Mesoscopic Kitaev Chains
summary: Kitaev chains realized in quantum dots coupled via superconducting segments provide a controllable platform for engineering Majorana zero modes (MZMs). In these systems, subgap states in the hybrid region mediate the effective coupling between quantum dots and determine the emergence of sweet-spots where MZMs are strongly localized. However, existing minimal treatments often oversimplify the mesoscopic hybrid region. We perform a full microscopic treatment of this hybrid segment, capturing the quasiparticle continuum and spin-split Andreev bound states (ABSs), and show that it fundamentally alters the minimal picture. We derive analytical expressions for the renormalized couplings and sweet-spot conditions, establishing a direct link between microscopic chain parameters and Majorana optimization and identifying experimentally relevant regimes for improved device performance. Critically, we find that parity-crossings of the ABS, marking the onset of an odd-parity spin-polarized regime in the segment, identify the optimal operating windows where MZMs are simultaneously well localized with a large gap to excited states.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过微观处理超导混合区域，揭示了自旋分裂Andreev束缚态和准粒子连续谱如何改变Kitaev链中Majorana零模优化的传统理解，建立了微观参数与Majorana优化的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 现有对量子点通过超导段耦合形成的Kitaev链的研究中，对介观混合区域的简化处理往往忽略了其复杂物理特性，需要完整的微观处理来准确理解Majorana零模的优化条件。
AI.method: 对超导混合区域进行完整的微观处理，考虑准粒子连续谱和自旋分裂的Andreev束缚态，推导出重整化耦合和甜点条件的解析表达式。
AI.result: 发现ABS的宇称交叉标记了混合区域奇宇称自旋极化状态的开始，这对应着Majorana零模同时具有良好局域性和大能隙的最佳操作窗口，建立了微观链参数与Majorana优化的直接联系。
AI.conclusion: 完整的微观处理从根本上改变了Kitaev链中Majorana零模优化的传统理解，为实验设备性能优化提供了理论指导，特别是ABS宇称交叉识别了Majorana同时具有良好局域性和大能隙的最佳操作窗口。

title: Emergent topological phase from a one-dimensional network of defects
summary: Symmetry-protected topological phases of matter, characterized by non-trivial band topology, are spectrally gapped and show non-trivial boundary phenomena. Here, we show that scattering states when interjected by an array of periodically modulated defects can result in emergent topological phases whose properties can be tuned by modulating the defect strengths. We dub this the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger network. We show that a scattering-matrix network model can capture the emergent symmetries and nontrivial winding of the quasienergy bands, which lead to distinct transport signatures and can be further periodically driven to realize a robust Thouless charge pump. We show that a microscopic lattice model embedded with a defect superlattice yields Bloch minibands that directly map to the network problem. We further verify that the physics we report is stable to disorder and point out concrete experimental solid-state platforms where it is readily realizable. Our work, in contrast to engineering atomic Hamiltonians, shows that defect engineering on metallic platforms can lead to emergent topological phases of quantum matter.

AI.tldr: 通过周期性调制缺陷阵列的散射态可实现涌现拓扑相，称为Su-Schrieffer-Heeger网络，其性质可通过缺陷强度调制调节，具有非平庸准能带缠绕和稳定输运特性。
AI.motivation: 传统对称性保护拓扑相具有能隙和非平庸边界现象，本文探索通过缺陷工程在金属平台上实现涌现拓扑相，而非通过设计原子哈密顿量。
AI.method: 提出散射矩阵网络模型捕捉涌现对称性和准能带非平庸缠绕，构建嵌入缺陷超晶格的微观晶格模型，验证其与网络问题的直接映射关系。
AI.result: 缺陷工程可产生具有非平庸拓扑的准能带，表现出独特输运特征，可通过周期性驱动实现鲁棒的Thouless电荷泵，且该物理对无序稳定，可在具体固态实验平台实现。
AI.conclusion: 缺陷工程在金属平台上可导致量子物质的涌现拓扑相，为拓扑物态研究提供了新途径，与传统原子哈密顿量工程形成对比。

title: Specific heat of thermally driven chains
summary: We investigate the thermal responses of a harmonic oscillator chain coupled at its boundaries to heat baths held at different temperatures. This setup sustains a steady energy flux, continuously dissipating heat into both reservoirs. By introducing slow variations in the bath temperatures, we quantify the resulting excess heat currents and thereby obtain the nonequilibrium heat capacity matrix at fixed but arbitrary temperature differences. We demonstrate the existence of a well-defined thermodynamic limit for long chains. The specific heat associated with energy exchanges with a single bath depends on the difference in friction coefficients governing the system-bath couplings. That thermokinetic effect is typical for nonequilibrium response. When the couplings with the thermal baths acquire temperature dependence, the specific heat correspondingly inherits a nontrivial temperature dependence, in sharp contrast with equilibrium. Our results provide the first explicit determination of specific heat(s) in a locally interacting, spatially extended driven system. Beyond its exact solvability, the model may offer a natural nonequilibrium extension of the Dulong-Petit law, capturing the high-temperature behavior of driven molecules.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了耦合到不同温度热浴的谐振子链的非平衡热响应，通过引入温度慢变量化了超额热流，获得了非平衡热容矩阵，并发现了与摩擦系数差相关的热动力学效应。
AI.motivation: 研究非平衡条件下空间扩展系统的热力学性质，特别是热容等响应函数，这些在平衡态下已有成熟理论，但在非平衡态下仍缺乏明确的理论框架和具体计算实例。
AI.method: 采用谐振子链模型，两端耦合到不同温度的热浴，引入温度慢变扰动，通过分析稳态能量通量和超额热流来计算非平衡热容矩阵，并研究系统在热力学极限下的行为。
AI.result: 获得了非平衡热容矩阵的显式表达式，证明了在长链极限下存在明确定义的热力学极限，发现热容与系统-热浴耦合的摩擦系数差相关，当耦合具有温度依赖性时，热容会继承非平凡的温变关系。
AI.conclusion: 首次在局部相互作用的空间扩展驱动系统中明确计算了非平衡热容，该模型可能提供杜隆-珀蒂定律的自然非平衡扩展，适用于描述高温下驱动分子的行为。

title: Anion Ordering and Phase Stability Govern Optical Band Gaps in BaZr(S,Se)3
summary: Chalcogenide perovskites have emerged as promising lead free materials for photovoltaic and thermoelectric applications. Among them, BaZrS3 has attracted particular attention due to its thermal and chemical stability, favorable optoelectronic properties, and low thermal conductivity. Here, we combine molecular dynamics and Monte Carlo simulations based on machine learned interatomic potentials with scanning transmission electron microscopy to investigate mixing thermodynamics and phase stability in the BaZr(S,Se)3 system. We identify an unusual ordered structure that persists at room temperature, most prominently at 33% S, where S and Se atoms form alternating layers within the crystal. Free energy calculations yield the temperature composition phase diagram, including a nonperovskite delta phase in the Se rich limit and a perovskite phase in the S rich limit, separated by a broad two phase region. Analysis of the dielectric function and the absorption coefficient demonstrates that composition, crystal structure, and anion ordering jointly control the optical band gap. Selenium alloying enables tuning between approximately 1.6 and 1.9eV, while anion ordering within a given composition reduces the gap by about 0.12eV. Lastly, variations between structural polymorphs give rise to band gap differences of up to 0.4eV.

AI.tldr: 通过机器学习势能结合分子动力学、蒙特卡洛模拟和扫描透射电镜研究BaZr(S,Se)3体系的混合热力学和相稳定性，发现室温下存在不寻常的阴离子有序结构，并揭示了成分、晶体结构和阴离子排序共同调控光学带隙的机制。
AI.motivation: 硫属钙钛矿作为无铅光伏和热电材料具有广阔前景，其中BaZrS3因其热化学稳定性、优异光电性能和低热导率备受关注。研究BaZr(S,Se)3体系的混合热力学和相稳定性对于理解材料性能调控机制至关重要。
AI.method: 结合基于机器学习势能的分子动力学和蒙特卡洛模拟，以及扫描透射电子显微镜技术，研究BaZr(S,Se)3体系的混合热力学和相稳定性。通过自由能计算构建温度-成分相图，并分析介电函数和吸收系数。
AI.result: 发现室温下存在不寻常的阴离子有序结构（33% S时S和Se原子形成交替层）；构建了包含富Se非钙钛矿δ相和富S钙钛矿相的相图，两者被宽两相区分隔；硒合金化可将带隙调谐在1.6-1.9eV范围，阴离子有序使带隙降低约0.12eV，结构多型体间带隙差异可达0.4eV。
AI.conclusion: BaZr(S,Se)3体系的成分、晶体结构和阴离子排序共同调控光学带隙，硒合金化、阴离子有序和结构多型体是调控材料光电性能的关键因素，为设计高性能无铅光伏和热电材料提供了理论指导。

title: The ground ytterbium doublet in h-YbMnO3 and the related low-temperature peculiarities of the compound
summary: We have performed detailed temperature-dependent study of optical f-f transitions of the Yb3+ ions in h-YbMnO3 by means of Fourier-transform spectroscopy. The splitting of the ground Kramers doublet as a function of temperature, D0(T), for the Yb3+ ion at 4b site was determined. The D0(T) function follows the dynamics of the manganese magnetic moment below TN = 87 K, indicating, that the ytterbium subsystem is magnetized by the magnetic field generated by an ordered manganese subsystem, which is consistent with the results of previous studies. Excitation of the upper component of the split ground doublet plays a significant role in low-temperature dynamics of the h-YbMnO3 crystal. Using the D0(T) function we calculated the temperature behavior of the of the Yb(4b) magnetic moment: it is in clear agreement with the neutron data [Phys. Rev. B 98, 134413, 2018]. The calculated contribution of Yb(4b) to heat capacity definitely explains the origin of the Schottky anomaly in the CP(T) dependence. A scenario for phase transitions in h-YbMnO3 is proposed in which the energy gain in the ytterbium system plays a key role.

AI.tldr: 通过傅里叶变换光谱研究h-YbMnO3中Yb3+离子的温度依赖性光学f-f跃迁，揭示了Yb(4b)位点基态Kramers双重态的分裂随温度变化，该分裂与锰磁矩动态一致，并解释了热容中的Schottky异常。
AI.motivation: 研究h-YbMnO3中Yb3+离子的光学跃迁，以理解稀土离子与锰磁性子系统之间的耦合机制，特别是Yb子系统如何受有序锰子系统产生的磁场影响，并解释实验观察到的热容异常。
AI.method: 采用傅里叶变换光谱技术，对h-YbMnO3中Yb3+离子的温度依赖性光学f-f跃迁进行详细研究。通过分析基态Kramers双重态的分裂函数D0(T)，计算Yb(4b)磁矩的温度行为，并与中子衍射数据对比。
AI.result: 确定了Yb(4b)位点基态双重态分裂函数D0(T)，该函数在TN=87K以下跟随锰磁矩动态变化。计算得到的Yb(4b)磁矩温度行为与中子数据一致，Yb(4b)对热容的贡献解释了CP(T)中的Schottky异常。
AI.conclusion: Yb子系统通过锰子系统产生的磁场被磁化，分裂基态双重态的上能级激发在低温动力学中起重要作用。提出了h-YbMnO3相变的新机制，其中Yb系统的能量增益起关键作用。

title: Exciton screening in C$_{60}$ and PTCDA complexes. TDDFT calculations with GGA and hybrid functionals
summary: Photoabsorption in the low-energy region for C$_{60}$ and PTCDA molecular complexes is studied within linear response TDDFT. For the PBE, B3LYP and HSE exchange-correlation (xc) functionals the dependence of the accuracy of the exciton energy on the electron-hole separation is analyzed. Particular attention is paid to the charge-transfer (CT) excitons. The inclusion of non-local exchange using hybrid functionals increases the accuracy of calculations for short-range excitons, however, the accuracy of hybrid functionals decreases significantly for long-range excitons. Moreover, as the exciton radius approaches the "screening length"\ , the simpler PBE functional gives more accurate excitonic energies than the mentioned hybrid functionals.

AI.tldr: 使用TDDFT研究C60和PTCDA分子复合物的低能区光吸收，分析不同泛函对激子能量计算精度与电子-空穴分离距离的关系
AI.motivation: 研究不同交换相关泛函（PBE、B3LYP、HSE）在计算分子复合物激子能量时的准确性，特别关注电荷转移激子，了解泛函性能随激子半径变化的规律
AI.method: 采用线性响应含时密度泛函理论（TDDFT），分析PBE、B3LYP和HSE三种交换相关泛函，研究激子能量计算精度与电子-空穴分离距离的关系
AI.result: 混合泛函（B3LYP、HSE）对短程激子计算更准确，但对长程激子计算精度显著下降；当激子半径接近"屏蔽长度"时，简单的PBE泛函比混合泛函给出更准确的激子能量
AI.conclusion: 混合泛函中非局域交换的引入改善了短程激子计算，但对长程激子效果不佳；对于接近屏蔽长度的激子，简单的PBE泛函反而更准确，表明泛函选择需考虑激子类型和尺度

title: Quantum matter is weakly entangled at low energies
summary: We construct upper bounds on entanglement entropies of many-body quantum states that have fixed energy expectation values with respect to geometrically local Hamiltonians. Our focus is on entanglement entropies of subsystems that make up approximately half of the full system. The upper bound on the von Neumann entanglement entropy is half the sum of the thermal entropies of two fictitious systems at the same temperature as one another, with an additional area-law contribution in some systems. The effective temperature is chosen such that the sum of the thermal energies of the two fictitious systems matches the constraint on the energy of the state in the original problem; at subextensive energies, this temperature decreases with increasing system size. Our upper bounds on Rényi entanglement entropies take an analogous form. As a first application we show that ground-state Schmidt ranks in frustration-free (FF) systems are upper bounded by the ground-state degeneracies of Hamiltonians acting on subsystems. Ground-state von Neumann and Rényi entanglement entropies therefore follow an area law when the zero-temperature thermal entropies of subsystems scale with surface areas, rather than with subsystem volumes. This result holds independently of the spectral gap. For physical models of quantum matter, which have well-defined specific heat capacities (and are not necessarily FF), our bounds provide a way to convert this thermodynamic data into constraints on pure-state entanglement at both subextensive and extensive energies. We also show that our upper bounds on half-system entanglement entropies are optimal, up to subleading corrections, in wide varieties of systems. Our results relate physical thermodynamic properties to the structure of many-body Hilbert space at low energies.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了具有固定能量期望值的量子态纠缠熵的上界，将热力学性质与低能多体希尔伯特空间结构联系起来。
AI.motivation: 研究具有固定能量期望值的量子态的纠缠熵上界，将物理热力学性质与多体希尔伯特空间结构联系起来，特别是在低能区域。
AI.method: 构造了冯·诺依曼纠缠熵和Rényi纠缠熵的上界，这些上界由两个虚构系统的热熵之和（加上可能的面积律项）给出。有效温度通过能量约束确定。
AI.result: 证明了无阻挫系统的基态纠缠熵遵循面积律（与能隙无关），并将比热容等热力学数据转化为纯态纠缠的约束。证明了半系统纠缠熵上界在广泛系统中是最优的。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了物理热力学性质与低能多体希尔伯特空间结构之间的定量联系，为理解量子物质的纠缠特性提供了新视角。

title: Spatial deformation of a ferromagnetic elastic rod
summary: Ferromagnetic elastic slender structures offer the potential for large actuation displacements under modest external magnetic fields, due to the magneto-mechanical coupling. This paper investigates the phase portraits of the Hamiltonian governing the three-dimensional deformation of inextensible ferromagnetic elastic rods subjected to combined terminal tension and twisting moment in the presence of a longitudinal magnetic field. The total energy functional is formulated by combining the Kirchhoff elastic strain energy with micromagnetic energy contributions appropriate to soft and hard ferromagnetic materials: magnetostatic (demagnetization) energy for the former, and exchange and Zeeman energies for the latter. Exploiting the circular cross-sectional symmetry and the integrable structure of the governing equations, conserved Casimir invariants are identified and the Hamiltonian is reduced to a single-degree-of-freedom system in the Euler polar angle.
